description_long: This wall-mounted sconce features a robust, dark metallic frame with a medieval-inspired design, including a flared base and ornate scrollwork arm. The central fixture holds a simulated flame, likely crafted from translucent material to mimic the appearance of fire, encased in a protective metal cage. The mounting bracket is sturdy and angular, designed to be affixed securely to a vertical surface. The sconce's finish is matte with subtle weathering, giving it an aged, rustic look. The flame element is the focal point, glowing with warm tones of orange, yellow, and white. Decorative elements such as the curled arm and pointed base add to its vintage, wrought-iron aesthetic.
description: A vintage, wall-mounted sconce with a dark metal frame, ornate scrollwork, and a simulated flame centerpiece. The design is rustic and medieval, featuring a protective cage and decorative flourishes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flame centerpiece, protective cage, and symmetrical flared base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the ornate scrollwork arm and the depth of the mounting bracket.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the mounting plate and the back of the metal frame, with less visibility of the flame.
description_view_3: Angled side view reveals both the scrollwork and the flame, emphasizing the sconce's three-dimensional structure.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, medieval-inspired design with ornate scrollwork and a rustic, wrought-iron appearance. Its decorative elements evoke historical torch sconces.
